inputs.label: Accounts Receivable (Alacaklar)
inputs.businessContext: Average accounts receivable balance. Based on standard financial statement analysis (GAAP/IFRS).

inputs.label: Accounts Payable (Borçlar)
inputs.businessContext: Average accounts payable balance. Standard financial metric.

inputs.label: Inventory (Stok)
inputs.businessContext: Average inventory value. Based on supply chain management principles (APICS).

inputs.label: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost of goods sold. Standard income statement item.

inputs.label: Net Sales (Net Satışlar)
inputs.businessContext: Annual net sales revenue. Standard income statement item.

inputs.label: Operating Expenses (Faaliyet Giderleri)
inputs.businessContext: Annual operating expenses excluding COGS. Standard financial metric.

inputs.label: Days in Period (Dönem Günü)
inputs.businessContext: Number of days in the analysis period. Typically 365 for annual.

inputs.label: Data Confidence (Veri Güveni)
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data quality. Used for adjusted outputs.

hiddenLossDrivers: if cashConversionCycle > 90 then 'Excessive cash conversion cycle indicates working capital inefficiency'
if cashFlowGapRatio > 1.0 then 'Cash flow gap exceeds net sales, critical liquidity risk'
suggestedActions: Reduce accounts receivable by tightening credit terms or improving collection processes
Reduce inventory levels through just-in-time (JIT) or lean inventory management
Extend accounts payable terms without harming supplier relationships
Consider factoring or supply chain financing to bridge the gap

premiumFeatures: Detailed report with breakdown and recommendations
